message.content: ```plantuml @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 class Dummy { <> } class User { <> + createAccount(AccountType) + login() + logout() } class Admin { <> + createService() + removeAccount() + removeAccount() + setHourlyRate() + setForm(Service.type, customerInfo) } class Employee { <> + createAccount(Employee) + selectService() + setBusinessHour() + boolean processServiceRequest() + notifyCustomer() } class Customer { <> + createAccount(Customer) + searchBranch() + selectService() + getForm(Service.type).fill() + submitForm() + rateBranch() } class Form { <> # firstName # lastName # dateOfBirth # address # email } class RentalForm { <> # pickupTime # returnTime # licenseType } class MovingForm { <> # startLocation # endLocation # numberOfMovers # numberOfBoxes } class carRentalForm { <> # carType } class truckRentalForm { <> # usageArea } Admin --|> User Employee --|> User Customer --|> User RentalForm --|> Form MovingForm --|> Form carRentalForm --|> RentalForm truckRentalForm --|> RentalForm note as note1 C Dummy\n \u25A1 private\n \u2663 protected\n \u25B4 pkg method()\n \u25CB public() end note @enduml ```
